conservative.name: X Marks the Spot
conservative.requirements: 3 favour. You must have a clear description or image of the object you are trying to find, or an item linked to it in some way on your person

success.description: Ranald guides you to a particular item, giving you a broad impression of where the item may be found (such as which city or, if you're in the proper city, which building)
As above, but more specific (such as the floor of a tall building, or which room)

boon.description: You learn an extra detail about the item such as whether it's guarded or moving

chaosStar.description: You must have it! Until the next sunrise, add to your dice pool for any check that doesn't help you get the item

reckless.name: X Marks the Spot
reckless.requirements: 3 favour. You must have a clear description or image of the object you are trying to find, or an item linked to it in some way on your person

success.description: Ranald guides you to a particular item, giving you a broad impression of where the item may be found (such as which city or, if you're in the proper city, which building)
As above, but more specific (such as the floor of a tall building, or which room)

boon.description: Gain to non-combat skill checks made to help you get the item

chaosStar.description: You must have it! Until the next sunrise, add to your dice pool for any check that doesn't help you get the item
